mxlibrary: [ { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><object label=\"<font><b style="">Name: %name%</b></font><div><b style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">units: %units%</b></div><div><b style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">maxClock: %maxClock%</b></div><div><b style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); background-color: transparent;">maxSteps: %maxSteps%</b></div><div><b style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); background-color: transparent;">simsFactor: %simsFactor%</b></div>\" type=\"properties\" name=\"PetriNet\" units=\"hrs\" maxClock=\"1E6\" maxSteps=\"1E12\" simsFactor=\"1.5E3\" placeholders=\"1\" id=\"2\"><mxCell parent=\"1\" style=\"shape=process;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;fontFamily=Courier New;autosizeText=1;fontSize=8;whiteSpace=wrap;size=0.03810492621527759;\" vertex=\"1\"><mxGeometry height=\"80\" width=\"80\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></object></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 80, "h": 80, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Properties" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><object label=\"<span style="background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212));"><font>%name%</font></span><div><font style="font-size: 15px;">%tokens%</font></div>\" placeholders=\"1\" type=\"place\" name=\"P1\" tokens=\"0\" min=\"None\" max=\"None\" limits=\"None\" id=\"2\"><mxCell parent=\"1\" style=\"ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;aspect=fixed;fontFamily=Courier New;fontStyle=1;fontSize=10;\" vertex=\"1\"><mxGeometry height=\"80\" width=\"80\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></object></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 80, "h": 80, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Place" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><object label=\"%name%\" placeholders=\"1\" type=\"transition\" name=\"T-instant\" maxFire=\"\" reset=\"\" vote=\"\" id=\"2\"><mxCell parent=\"1\" style=\"whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;aspect=fixed;fontFamily=Courier New;fontStyle=1;fontSize=10;fillColor=#D8D8D8;\" vertex=\"1\"><mxGeometry height=\"80\" width=\"80\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></object></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 80, "h": 80, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Instant" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><object label=\"%name%<div><font>D:%delay%</font></div>\" placeholders=\"1\" type=\"transition\" name=\"T-delay\" maxFire=\"\" reset=\"\" delay=\"1\" vote=\"\" id=\"2\"><mxCell parent=\"1\" style=\"whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;aspect=fixed;fontFamily=Courier New;fontStyle=1;fontSize=10;\" vertex=\"1\"><mxGeometry height=\"80\" width=\"80\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></object></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 80, "h": 80, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Delay" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><object label=\"%name%<div><font>U:%uniform%</font></div>\" placeholders=\"1\" type=\"transition\" name=\"T-uniform\" maxFire=\"\" reset=\"\" uniform=\"1\" vote=\"\" id=\"2\"><mxCell parent=\"1\" style=\"whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;aspect=fixed;fontFamily=Courier New;fontStyle=1;fontSize=10;\" vertex=\"1\"><mxGeometry height=\"80\" width=\"80\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></object></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 80, "h": 80, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Uniform" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><object label=\"%name%<div><font>C:%cyclic%</font></div>\" placeholders=\"1\" type=\"transition\" name=\"T-cyclic\" maxFire=\"\" reset=\"\" cyclic=\"1:0\" vote=\"\" id=\"2\"><mxCell parent=\"1\" style=\"whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;aspect=fixed;fontFamily=Courier New;fontStyle=1;fontSize=10;\" vertex=\"1\"><mxGeometry height=\"80\" width=\"80\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></object></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 80, "h": 80, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Cyclic" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><object label=\"%name%<div><font>W:%weibull%</font></div>\" placeholders=\"1\" type=\"transition\" name=\"T-Weibull\" maxFire=\"\" reset=\"\" weibull=\"1:1\" vote=\"\" id=\"2\"><mxCell parent=\"1\" style=\"whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;aspect=fixed;fontFamily=Courier New;fontStyle=1;fontSize=10;\" vertex=\"1\"><mxGeometry height=\"80\" width=\"80\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></object></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 80, "h": 80, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Weibull" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><object label=\"%name%<div><font>L:%lognorm%</font></div>\" placeholders=\"1\" type=\"transition\" name=\"T-lognorm\" maxFire=\"\" reset=\"\" lognorm=\"1:1\" vote=\"\" id=\"2\"><mxCell parent=\"1\" style=\"whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;aspect=fixed;fontFamily=Courier New;fontStyle=1;fontSize=10;\" vertex=\"1\"><mxGeometry height=\"80\" width=\"80\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></object></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 80, "h": 80, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Lognorm" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><object label=\"%name%<div><font>R:%rate%</font></div>\" placeholders=\"1\" type=\"transition\" name=\"T-rate\" maxFire=\"\" reset=\"\" rate=\"1\" vote=\"\" id=\"2\"><mxCell parent=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><object label=\"%name%<div><font>B:%beta%</font></div>\" placeholders=\"1\" type=\"transition\" name=\"T-beta\" maxFire=\"\" reset=\"\" beta=\"1:2\" vote=\"\" id=\"2\"><mxCell parent=\"1\" style=\"whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;aspect=fixed;fontFamily=Courier New;fontStyle=1;fontSize=10;\" vertex=\"1\"><mxGeometry height=\"80\" width=\"80\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></object></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 80, "h": 80, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Beta" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><object label=\"\" placeholders=\"1\" type=\"std\" id=\"2\"><mxCell edge=\"1\" parent=\"1\" style=\"endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;fontFamily=Courier New;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;endFill=1;jumpStyle=arc;jumpSize=10;\"><mxGeometry relative=\"1\" as=\"geometry\"><mxPoint as=\"sourcePoint\"/><mxPoint x=\"80\" as=\"targetPoint\"/></mxGeometry></mxCell></object><object label=\"%weight%\" placeholders=\"1\" weight=\"\" id=\"3\"><mxCell connectable=\"0\" parent=\"2\" style=\"edgeLabel;resizable=0;html=1;;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;labelBackgroundColor=none;fontFamily=Courier New;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;\" vertex=\"1\"><mxGeometry relative=\"1\" as=\"geometry\"><mxPoint y=\"-10\" as=\"offset\"/></mxGeometry></mxCell></object></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 80, "h": 1, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Std Arc" }, { "xml": y=\"-5.684341886080802e-14\" as=\"sourcePoint\"/><mxPoint x=\"80\" y=\"0.5699999999999363\" as=\"targetPoint\"/></mxGeometry></mxCell></object><object label=\"%weight%\" placeholders=\"1\" edge=\"1\" parent=\"1\" style=\"endArrow=oval;html=1;rounded=0;fontFamily=Courier New;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;endFill=1;strokeColor=#C00000;fontColor=#C00000;endSize=7;dashed=1;dashPattern=1 id=\"2\"><mxCell edge=\"1\" parent=\"1\" style=\"endArrow=oval;html=1;rounded=0;fontFamily=Courier New;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;endFill=1;strokeColor=#C00000;fontColor=#C00000;endSize=7;dashed=1;dashPattern=1 1;jumpStyle=arc;jumpSize=10;\"><mxGeometry relative=\"1\" as=\"geometry\"><mxPoint as=\"sourcePoint\"/><mxPoint x=\"80\" as=\"targetPoint\"/></mxGeometry></mxCell></object><object label=\"%weight%\" placeholders=\"1\" weight=\"2\" id=\"3\"><mxCell connectable=\"0\" parent=\"2\" relative=\"1\" as=\"geometry\"><mxPoint y=\"-10\" as=\"offset\"/></mxGeometry></mxCell></object></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 80, "h": 1, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Weighted Inhibit Arc" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><object label=\"\" placeholders=\"1\" type=\"pcn\" id=\"2\"><mxCell edge=\"1\" parent=\"1\" style=\"endArrow=diamond;html=1;rounded=0;fontFamily=Courier New;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;endFill=1;strokeColor=#0000FF;fontColor=#C00000;endSize=7;dashed=1;targetPerimeterSpacing=0;strokeWidth=1;jumpStyle=arc;jumpSize=10;\"><mxGeometry relative=\"1\" as=\"geometry\"><mxPoint as=\"sourcePoint\"/><mxPoint x=\"80\" as=\"targetPoint\"/></mxGeometry></mxCell></object><object label=\"%weight%\" placeholders=\"1\" weight=\"\" id=\"3\"><mxCell connectable=\"0\" parent=\"2\" style=\"edgeLabel;resizable=0;html=1;;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;labelBackgroundColor=none;fontFamily=Courier New;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#0000FF;\" vertex=\"1\"><mxGeometry relative=\"1\" as=\"geometry\"><mxPoint y=\"-10\" as=\"offset\"/></mxGeometry></mxCell></object></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 80, "h": 1, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Place-Conditional Arc" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><object label=\"\" placeholders=\"1\" type=\"pcn\" id=\"2\"><mxCell edge=\"1\" parent=\"1\" style=\"endArrow=diamond;html=1;rounded=0;fontFamily=Courier New;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;endFill=1;strokeColor=#0000FF;fontColor=#C00000;endSize=7;dashed=1;jumpStyle=arc;jumpSize=10;\"><mxGeometry relative=\"1\" as=\"geometry\"><mxPoint as=\"sourcePoint\"/><mxPoint x=\"80\" as=\"targetPoint\"/></mxGeometry></mxCell></object><object label=\"%weight%\" placeholders=\"1\" weight=\"2\" id=\"3\"><mxCell connectable=\"0\" parent=\"2\" style=\"edgeLabel;resizable=0;html=1;;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;labelBackgroundColor=none;fontFamily=Courier New;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#0000FF;\" vertex=\"1\"><mxGeometry relative=\"1\" as=\"geometry\"><mxPoint y=\"-10\" as=\"offset\"/></mxGeometry></mxCell></object></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 80, "h": 1, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Weighted Place-Conditional Arc" } ]
